title: Guest viewable access on boards
excerpt: As a guest, they can see all tabs at the top (main board, request forms, etc). I’d like to request a way to limit their views based on what the Admin chooses. There are several tabs that me as the admin wants to have but…

posts.author: LDillon1980 (Luke Dillon)
posts.cookedHtml: As a guest, they can see all tabs at the top (main board, request forms, etc). I’d like to request a way to limit their views based on what the Admin chooses. There are several tabs that me as the admin wants to have but do not want the guest to see.
